statements.sql: SELECT @mode = CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END FROM silver.DimDynamicBranch
statements.rationale: Control-flow variable assignment that determines which branch executes. Not a data transformation — dbt handles idempotent load strategy selection natively.

statements.sql: MERGE silver.DimDynamicBranch AS tgt USING (SELECT CountryRegionCode AS BranchCode, CountryRegionName AS BranchName, 'Global' AS Region, GETDATE() AS LoadedAt FROM bronze.CountryRegion) AS src ON tgt.BranchCode = src.BranchCode WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tgt.BranchName = src.BranchName, tgt.LoadedAt = src.LoadedAt WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (BranchCode, BranchName, Region, LoadedAt) VALUES (src.BranchCode, src.BranchName, src.Region, src.LoadedAt)
statements.rationale: IF-branch (@mode=1): dynamic MERGE that upserts branch records from bronze.CountryRegion into silver.DimDynamicBranch. Core transformation executed when the target table is non-empty.

statements.sql: INSERT INTO silver.DimDynamicBranch (BranchCode, BranchName, Region, LoadedAt) SELECT CountryRegionCode, CountryRegionName, 'Global', GETDATE() FROM bronze.CountryRegion
statements.rationale: ELSE-branch (@mode=2): dynamic INSERT that performs an initial full load from bronze.CountryRegion when the target table is empty. Core transformation that seeds the dimension.
